steps.t: Zôreth's watching-stones can be found along the causeway to Lûghash and Barad-dûr in Dor Amarth. Spakorth has asked you to challenge Zôreth's watching…
Spakorth can be found outside the lower gates to Lûghash in Dor Amarth. You have forced Zôreth's fell spirits from the watching-stones, but some appea…
